form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th over 295m at this track beaten 3.5 lengths (17.40) behind Impressive Nora in a Class 2 on April 10. Placed two back at this track. Include in all combinations.

form.formComment: Looks close to another win after her success on March 11 at Ascot Park over 457m. Last start was second over 295m in 17.42, behind Mitcham Eric. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Go close.
